heading: Definitions
label: 5411 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 458ccc of this title

children.heading: Board
children.label: 1 Board
children.text: The term “Board” means the Board of Directors of the Foundation.

children.heading: Bureau
children.label: 2 Bureau
children.text: The term “Bureau” means the Office of Justice Services of the Bureau of Indian Affairs.

children.heading: Committee
children.label: 3 Committee
children.text: The term “Committee” means the Committee for the Establishment of the Indian Law Enforcement Foundation established under .section 5412(e)(1) of this title

children.heading: Foundation
children.label: 4 Foundation
children.text: The term “Foundation” means the Indian Law Enforcement Foundation established under .section 5412 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
